textPlain: And oddly code bases will likely improve in quality given Claude’s recent performance.It’s like having a vindictive drunken monkey as a pair programmer.
503 upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: remote connection failure, transport failure reason: delayed connect error: Connection refused

This is likely due to the Claude Builder Club[0] free pro account access codes being sent out to students - as I have just received mine.edit: it's back up for me now[0]: https://www.claude.com/programs/campus
>   503 upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: connection timeout.Totally borked right now. Time to have another look at claude-code-router.
At Anthropic: "How do I restart Claude when Claude is...." oh, wait.Working now. Looks like they turned it off, waited five seconds and turned it back on again.
They might want to try codex.
So is appsignal, z.ai api, notion. seems like something big happened.
why don't they hire ppl to fix all this. crazy that companies with billions of dollars in investments are hiring so little.
yikes. just started working on an idea.
Took them an hour to fix it, good job!

It looks like Claude Code switched the default model to Sonnet 4.5, even for max users who are paying for Opus. I had to set the environment variable ANTHROPIC_MODEL=opus to get opus back. Sonnet 4.5 indeed acts like a drunken monkey on the math heavy legacy C++ codebase I'm working on.
